meta.coordinate_system: address-anchored: x=target line, y=world up, z=face-on (x x y); LH mirrored on x

angle_conventions.pitch: absolute forward bend, positive = toward ball
angle_conventions.roll: absolute side bend, positive = trail-side down
angle_conventions.x_factor: pelvis_yaw - thorax_yaw; positive at top = shoulders > hips
